audio_summary: The video features an epic, orchestral battle theme playing continuously in the background. Sound effects include the whoosh of missiles firing, heavy explosions with stone crumbling as castles are destroyed, and festive fireworks popping. UI sounds consist of a soft 'pop' when placing characters and a descending, slightly comical musical jingle for the 'Battle Failed' screen. The final title screen features a prominent, continuous fire crackling sound.

sounds.name: Epic Battle Theme
sounds.description: An energetic, orchestral track with driving strings, bold brass, and steady percussion, creating a tense and heroic atmosphere suitable for a battle game.
sounds.generation_prompt: Epic orchestral battle music, driving rhythm, bold brass, fast strings, tense, heroic, continuous loop.

sounds.name: Missile Launch
sounds.description: A fast, fiery whoosh sound with a slight rocket engine hiss, indicating a projectile being fired.
sounds.game_event: Missiles are fired from the castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: Rocket launch whoosh, fast projectile, fiery trail, mid-range frequency, short attack.

sounds.name: Castle Explosion and Crumble
sounds.description: A heavy, impactful explosion followed by the low, rumbling sound of stone debris crumbling and falling.
sounds.game_event: Missiles hit the enemy castle, causing damage and destruction.
sounds.generation_prompt: Heavy stone impact, loud explosion, debris crumbling, low rumble, sharp attack, long decay.

sounds.name: Character Placement Pop
sounds.description: A short, soft, high-pitched 'pop' or 'bloop' sound, similar to a bubble bursting.
sounds.game_event: Player drags and drops a character into the castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: Soft UI pop, bubble burst, short, pleasant, high pitch, clean.

sounds.name: Fireworks Popping
sounds.description: A series of sharp pops, crackles, and faint whistles, characteristic of fireworks exploding in the sky.
sounds.game_event: Fireworks appear when a castle is completely destroyed.
sounds.generation_prompt: Fireworks exploding, crackling, whistling, festive, multiple pops, mid to high frequencies.

sounds.name: Battle Failed Jingle
sounds.description: A short, descending musical phrase played on brass or synth, conveying a sense of loss or comical failure.
sounds.generation_prompt: Short descending musical jingle, comical failure, brass or synth, disappointed tone, game over sound.

sounds.name: Fire Crackling
sounds.description: A continuous, warm sound of a roaring fire with distinct crackling and popping of burning wood.
sounds.game_event: Plays on the final title screen with the burning castle.
sounds.generation_prompt: Roaring fire, crackling flames, burning wood, continuous loop, warm and intense.
